status.description: An event arrived that the current test state does not recognize. This is probably due to an internal logic error in the test state machine.

status.text: Event '%1%' does not exist for this test's state machine
status.description: An event send was attempt arrived that is not defined by the current test.

status.text: Error during execution of test phase: %1%
status.description: Error during execution of test phase

status.text: Operation '%1%' is illegal' while the test model is in state '%2%'
status.description: An operation was attempted that is illegal in the test's current state
